name: BMW N54 (335i / 135i) — INA0S, stock ORI
note: Stock read. BMW defs carry no EPK -> after loading pick 'BMW N54 N54__INA0S' manually.

name: BMW N54 (335i / 135i) — IKM0S, stock ORI

name: Mazda MX-5 NC (MZR LF) — LFH9ED, stock
note: Stock factory calibration. EPK auto-detect: just drop the bin, editor picks the def. Maps: MAF transfer fn, Load Scaling (RPM x Load), injector PW + global fuel scalars.

name: Mazda MX-5 NC (MZR LF) — L831ED, stock
note: Stock factory calibration, different id/load values from LFH9ED. EPK auto-detect.
